meta-description: Learn about tax filing requirements for dependents by reviewing the definition in the HealthCare.gov Glossary.
title: Tax filing requirement (for dependents)
excerpt: The minimum income requiring a dependent to file a federal tax return. 2025 filing requirements for dependents under 65: Earned income of at least $15,750, or unearned income (like from investments or trusts) of at least $1,350 You must include on your Marketplace application income for any dependent required to file.
content:
The minimum income requiring a dependent to file a federal tax return. 2025 filing requirements for dependents under 65: Earned income of at least $15,750, or unearned income (like from investments or trusts) of at least $1,350. You must include on your Marketplace application income for any dependent required to file.

Different thresholds apply for dependents 65 or older or blind, or who have both earned income (like wages and salaries) and unearned income.

Taxpayers who aren't dependents have other filing thresholds.

Get IRS details on filing thresholds for dependents (and non-dependents).
